name: context_shift
purpose: Classify whether the latest message continues, branches from, returns to, or starts a conversation thread.

examples.reason: User continued the same debugging thread from earlier in the conversation.
User asked a tangentially related question while the main topic is still open.
User circled back to a topic discussed several messages ago.
User opened an entirely different subject with no connection to prior messages.

fallback.reason: Classifier failed; context relationship is ambiguous.
